features: SOOTHING HEAT WRAP - This microwaveable Lavender heat wrap is a soothing and therapeutic solution designed for ultimate relaxation and comfort. Filled with natural dried lavender and heat-retaining materials, this 500g wrap provides gentle warmth and a calming lavender scent to help ease tension, muscle aches, and stress.

AROMATHERAPY BENEFITS - Infused with natural dried lavender, known for its calming properties, the heat wrap helps promote relaxation, reduce anxiety, and encourage restful sleep, whilst helping to ease tension, muscle aches, and stress. Unwind, de-stress, and feel cozy every day.

SOFT FLEECE COVER - The exterior offers a plush, velvety texture, enhancing comfort during use. It feels gentle against the skin, making it perfect for cozying up on chilly days. Designed to mold to the contours of the body, this heat wrap is ideal for use on the neck, shoulders, back, stomach, or legs, providing targeted relief where needed. Approx length 38cm.

PORTABLE AND REUSABLE - This heat wrap provides a natural and reusable alternative to electric heating pads, requiring no batteries or electricity once heated. Simply warm in the microwave for up to 60 seconds and enjoy long-lasting heat. Lightweight and easy to carry, making it a great travel companion for relaxation on the go, whether at home, work, or while traveling.
